final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-art
Asset type: fine art print, vertical scroll
Primary request: traditional Chinese ink wash landscape painting with mountains, mist, pine trees, thatched cottage, and an old fisherman by the stream
Scene/backdrop: layered mountain ranges fading into distance, ethereal mist swirling between peaks, serene mountain stream in foreground
Subject: distant mountains like dark ink wash, pine trees with gnarled branches, rustic thatched-roof cottage, elderly scholar in traditional robes fishing by the stream
Style/medium: traditional Chinese ink wash painting (shanshui), xieyi freehand brushwork, rice paper texture
Composition/framing: vertical scroll format, three-layer composition (foreground stream and figure, middle ground trees and cottage, background misty peaks), generous negative space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light through mist, tranquil and contemplative atmosphere, ethereal and timeless
Color palette: monochromatic ink tones (black, gray, white), subtle blue-green mineral accents on distant peaks, warm sepia on cottage
Materials/textures: rice paper absorbency, dry brush texture for pine bark, wet ink bleeding for mist, calligraphic line work
Constraints: preserve traditional Chinese painting aesthetics, maintain intentional negative space (liu bai), emphasize spiritual emptiness and vastness
Avoid: photorealistic detail, bright saturated colors, western perspective, heavy outlines, cluttered composition
